creator: adridg@freebsd.org
text:
Regarding the BROKEN line: upstream dropped support for OpenSSL < 1.1.1, which is why 11-STABLE with base SSL won't work. We (kde@) don't have the time and certainly not the security-chops to backport anything massive like that.

Your best bet is to update (downdate?) to a July 5th ports tree, deleting qt5-*, and then building qt5 with that ports tree.
